application.name: BizPOS (Biztonic Point-Of-Sale)
application.description: Multi-platform POS system with offline-first architecture, Firebase backend, and comprehensive business management features

sync_strategy.description: Authoritative atomic events (Ledger) drive all state changes. Client-side materialized views are eventually consistent.
phases: 4. State Sync (Pull materialized docs using serverUpdatedAt)

conflict_resolution.logic: Server ignores duplicate IdempotencyKeys; state is rebuilt from events.

fields.name: string
fields.role: string (Super Admin | Admin | Owner | Manager | Cashier | Kitchen Staff | Waiter | Unauthorized)

fields.name: string
fields.subscriptionPlan: string (Free | Basic | Startup | Pro | Enterprise | Premium)

central_catalog.description: Global product catalog for all stores

helper_functions.isAuthenticated: Checks if user is logged in
helper_functions.getUserData: Fetches user profile from users collection
helper_functions.isStoreAuthorized: Validates user access to specific store

collection_rules.users: Read: All authenticated, Write: Self or Admin
collection_rules.stores: Read: All authenticated, Write: Store authorized users
collection_rules.central_catalog: Read: All authenticated, Write: Admin only
collection_rules.plans: Read: All authenticated, Write: Admin only

foreign_keys: orderId REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE

responsibilities: SQLite CRUD operations for orders, inventory, customers

steps: 1. User selects items in POS screen
4. Write to local SQLite database with syncStatus='PENDING'
7. SyncService pushes Event + Resulting Doc to Firebase
8. On success: Update local syncStatus='SYNCED' and version++
create_order_workflow.offline_behavior: Full functionality, queues for later sync
create_order_workflow.deletion_policy: NO_HARD_DELETE — Orders are VOIDED only to preserve audit trail.
create_order_workflow.immutability_policy: Terminal Status Lock — No edits allowed once Completed | Cancelled | VOID | Refunded.
create_order_workflow.financial_safety: Snapshots — Tax and Item Price frozen at time of creation.
create_order_workflow.sync_mode: Strict Ledger — Direct writes to orders collection blocked; events only.

steps: 1. Store owner navigates to Manage Employees
6. Write to local storage immediately (Optimistic UI)
7. Queue operation in SyncService (regardless of connectivity)
8. If online: SyncService pushes to cloud immediately
9. Employee can login immediately with generated credentials

trigger_conditions: Periodic timer (every 5 minutes if LIVE mode)
process: 3. For each queued operation: Execute Firebase write
4. On success: Mark as synced, remove from queue
7. Query each collection with updatedAt > lastSyncTime
8. Upsert received documents to local database

special_handling.roles: Fetch both system roles (storeId=null) and store-specific roles

database: SQLite WAL mode for concurrent reads
Indexed queries on storeId, date, status
Foreign key constraints with CASCADE delete

known_issues.web: win32 package incompatibility prevents web compilation
